accuracy_notice.warning: Yoruba tonal marks may be INCORRECT
accuracy_notice.recommendation: Verify with Yoruba language specialists and Ifá priests
scholarly_sources: Abimbola, W. (1976). Ifá: An Exposition of Ifá Literary Corpus. Oxford University Press.
Idowu, E.B. (1962). Olódùmarè: God in Yoruba Belief. Longmans.
Bascom, W. (1969). Ifá Divination: Communication Between Gods and Men in West Africa. Indiana University Press.
accuracy_notice.tonal_mark_reference: Yoruba has 3 tones: high (´), mid (unmarked), low (`)
accuracy_notice.living_tradition_notice: Ifá is a living tradition - consult practicing Babalawo for accuracy
